evals.prompt: Install the revise-docs push guard for this project: project-scoped settings, default doc-file set, guard only doc-sweep-enabled repos.
assertions: Copies the hook script to a stable path under the project's .claude/hooks/
Writes a config JSON capturing the chosen docMode/repoScope (or equivalent)
Merges a PreToolUse matcher:Bash hook entry into the project settings.json referencing the copied hook + config, preserving any existing settings
Re-running the install does not duplicate the hook entry (idempotent)
